private_authoritative_store.notes: Must reference a private or offline authoritative store.

operator_policy_digest_pinned.notes: Record an independently pinned policy digest.

separate_gateway_identity.notes: Gateway must run separately from Muse.

structured_operations_only.notes: Prove arbitrary commands and URLs are rejected.

vtx_checks_active.notes: Verify signature, expiry, nonce, scope and digest checks.

protected_branches_active.notes: Confirm protected branches on target repositories.

protected_branch_denial_passed.notes: Record failed write attempt to protected branch.

trust_core_denial_passed.notes: Record failed access attempt to Repository 1.

emergency_freeze_tested.notes: Record freeze activation and denial result.
